description: Attention inbox for the analyst. The decider (or human) writes items here when content changes in ways that might affect prior analysis. The analyst checks this between Mode 2 (human notes) and Mode 3 (defense neutralization).

items.reason: Decider patched section 6.8: (1) renamed WIN-012 → WIN-053 in title, TLDR, and opening paragraph (WIN misattribution fix); (2) corrected IGRF coefficient count from 168 to 195 for degree 13. The mathematical single-exponential argument is still present and flagged as factually wrong (ISS-737/EXP-075) — analyst should review surrounding content for consistency.
items.resolution_note: ISS-735 (WIN misattribution) and ISS-736 (IGRF count) already fixed by decider on GitHub. ISS-737 (mathematical error): wrote EXP-076 with corrected section 6.8 text — replaces false single-exponential collapse claim with flux conservation argument and fitted-parameters critique. TLDR also rewritten. Verified all math computationally. Noted that ISS-737's assigned_exp field incorrectly points to EXP-075 (SEC-2b.7); decider should update to EXP-076.

items.reason: Section 1.8 integrated (EXP-078). Three verdict changes queued for human approval: WIN-044 (Misleading→Self-Contradicted, strong), WIN-068 and WIN-010 (Std Model Explains→Self-Contradicted, moderate). If human approves, verify cascade science still holds after curmudgeon first-review.

EXP-079 integrated: section substantially rewritten with new overshoot threshold argument, WIN-027 cross-version persistence, counts-against-model reconstruction, and silent 33/34→35/35 methodology change. Verify all new claims are scientifically sound.
